metadata.title: Land of Aventuria Reconstruction
metadata.description: Draft reconstruction scaffold generated from decoded Apple II Adventure Construction Set Land of Aventuria data. Maps/coordinates are placeholders until binary map grids are decoded.
metadata.author: Decoded from Stuart Smith's Adventure Construction Set legacy disk

presentation.introText: Land of Aventuria reconstruction scaffold. The original consists of a Map of Aventuria hub, tutorial and genre mini-adventures, and a hidden Secret Adventure.

starterLibraryPacks.name: Classic ACS Land of Aventuria Reference
starterLibraryPacks.description: Decoded Land of Aventuria reference objects for recreating classic ACS starter packs and demo mini-adventures.
starterLibraryPacks.source: Land of Aventuria Apple II DSK deep text/table decode

regions.name: Map of Aventuria
regions.description: The world-map hub linking Land of Aventuria mini-adventures.
regions.loreNotes: Decoded mini-adventure kind: hub. Exact maps and room coordinates still pending binary map-grid decode.
sourceReferences: Land of Aventuria Apple II DSK deep decode

regions.name: How To Play
regions.description: Core tutorial for help squares, sword pickup, dragon combat, hospitals, power, and spells.

regions.description: Starship, planet, and asteroid story about stolen Crystite, a bomb, a traitor, and Wistrik's time machine.

sourceReferences: Land of Aventuria Apple II DSK deep decode

entityDefinitions.name: Adventurer
entityDefinitions.description: Player role in Land of Aventuria.

entityDefinitions.name: Enemy Guard
entityDefinitions.description: Guard at door in Agent OO111.

entityDefinitions.name: Jonathan's Sister
entityDefinitions.description: Woman who asks Sam Club to solve Jonathan's murder.

entityDefinitions.name: Jonathan Blublud
entityDefinitions.description: Murder victim referenced in Sam Club.

entityDefinitions.name: Fast-Talking Bank Guard
entityDefinitions.description: Actually a blocking space requiring an object.

entityDefinitions.name: Dragon
entityDefinitions.description: Tutorial combat enemy carrying the magic lamp.

entityDefinitions.name: Genie
entityDefinitions.description: Summoned by lamp spell to grant a gift.

entityDefinitions.name: Bookshop Owner
entityDefinitions.description: Requests autograph, contributes to army supplies.

entityDefinitions.name: Farmer
entityDefinitions.description: Provides clue about river, blizzard, and Hessian brandy.

entityDefinitions.name: Communications Officer
entityDefinitions.description: Reports distress call from Planet Irata.

entityDefinitions.name: King Ban-Dunten
entityDefinitions.description: King of Irata asking for help.

entityDefinitions.name: Secret Agent OO111
entityDefinitions.description: Decoded short table and spy mini-adventure identity.

itemDefinitions.name: Secret Plans
itemDefinitions.description: Plans to find and escape with in the Nazi Castle.

itemDefinitions.name: Sword
itemDefinitions.description: Tutorial melee weapon for dragon combat.

itemDefinitions.name: Magic Lamp
itemDefinitions.description: Dropped by the dragon; grants Summon Genie spell/power.

itemDefinitions.name: Genie's Gift
itemDefinitions.description: Gift granted after successful Summon Genie spell.

itemDefinitions.name: Gun
itemDefinitions.description: Agent OO111 firearm used with FIRE against guards.

itemDefinitions.name: Pistol
itemDefinitions.description: Aventuria allows only one pistol at a time.

itemDefinitions.name: Microfilm
itemDefinitions.description: Pollution-free fuels plans in Agent OO111.

itemDefinitions.name: Red Key
itemDefinitions.description: Dropped on weird machine for reward.

itemDefinitions.name: Hawk Statue
itemDefinitions.description: Family emblem statue in Sam Club mystery.

itemDefinitions.name: Diamonds
itemDefinitions.description: Stolen diamonds in Sam Club mystery; sellable in store.

itemDefinitions.name: Confession
itemDefinitions.description: Acquired after unmasking the murderer.

itemDefinitions.name: Autograph
itemDefinitions.description: Dropped at bookshop table for army supplies contribution.

itemDefinitions.name: Boat
itemDefinitions.description: Forgotten historical object needed to cross the Delaware.

itemDefinitions.name: Brandy
itemDefinitions.description: Bought by Hessian soldiers; clue in Delaware scenario.

itemDefinitions.name: Cake
itemDefinitions.description: Bake-sale item offered by schoolteacher twin.

itemDefinitions.name: Magic Scroll
itemDefinitions.description: Hidden in Deep Dank Dungeon; needed to complete mini-adventure.

itemDefinitions.name: Crystite
itemDefinitions.description: Stolen/heavy valuable mineral from Irata/Krazo.

itemDefinitions.name: Magic Bag
itemDefinitions.description: Helps carry heavy Crystite to a store.

itemDefinitions.name: Bomb
itemDefinitions.description: Port-engine-pod bomb in Save the Galaxy.

itemDefinitions.name: Bomb Fragment
itemDefinitions.description: Analyzed to identify traitor.

itemDefinitions.name: Nest Egg
itemDefinitions.description: Money stash in captain's quarters.

itemDefinitions.name: Fan
itemDefinitions.description: White Rabbit's lost fan.

itemDefinitions.name: Gloves
itemDefinitions.description: White Rabbit's lost gloves.

itemDefinitions.name: Mushroom
itemDefinitions.description: Alice caterpillar scene object.

itemDefinitions.name: Tarts
itemDefinitions.description: Queen/Knave trial object.

itemDefinitions.name: Parchment
itemDefinitions.description: White Rabbit reads accusation from parchment.

itemDefinitions.name: Daisies
itemDefinitions.description: Opening Alice scene object.

itemDefinitions.name: Red Cross
itemDefinitions.description: Hospital/life-force symbol in Nazi Castle.

itemDefinitions.name: Amino Acids Trace Analyzer
itemDefinitions.description: Identifies anyone in the crew who touched a clue.

itemDefinitions.name: Transporter
itemDefinitions.description: Beams player down to planet surface.

itemDefinitions.name: Time Machine
itemDefinitions.description: Wistrik's dangerous device connecting sci-fi/fantasy plots.

spellDefinitions.description: Lamp-granted spell used in How To Play; consumes power and eventually summons a genie who gives a gift.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: YOU ARE IN A CELL BENEATH A NAZICASTLE DURING WORLD WAR II. TRYTO FIND THE SECRET PLANS AND ESCAPE. USE THE RED CROSSES TO KEEP YOUR LIFE FORCE HIGH--THE GUARDS ARE WELL-ARMED AND DANGEROUS! TO EXIT, GO THROUGH THEBOTTOM DOOR OF THIS ROOM. THIS MINI-ADVENTURE SHOWS HOW YOU CAN MAKE ONE ROOM INTO MANY ROOMS. NOTE THE SMALL ROOM IN THE CORNER THAT YOU CAN'T REACH FROM HERE! IF YOU FIND YOUR WAYBLOCKED BY AN OBJECT YOU CAN'T PICK UP (I.E. YOU ALREADY OWN 1)DROP THE OLD ONE BEHIND YOU 1ST.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: IF YOU'RE HAVING TROUBLE GETTINGTO THE REST OF THE ROOM, TRY GOING THROUGH A DOOR THAT SEEMS TO LEAD IN THE WRONG DIRECTION IN ORDER TO WORK YOUR WAY BACK FROM ANOTHER ANGLE. YOU CAN GETTO THE STAIRWAY WITHOUT USING ANY HIDDEN DOORS--KEEP TRYING! "YOU MUST SOLVE THE MURDER OF MYPOOR, SWEET BROTHER JONATHAN!" THE WOMAN SOBS. "I SHALL NOT REST UNTIL OUR FAMILY HAS BEEN AVENGED! AND THEY STOLE THE PRETTY STATUE OF OUR FAMILY EMBLEM, A HAWK IN FLIGHT. IT'S PROBABLY NOT WORTH MUCH, BUT..."

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: "ALL RIGHT, I ADMIT, I KILLED HIM!" SHE CRIES OUT, HER VOICE HIGH AND TAUT. "HE MADE ME LOVEHIM, BUT ALL HE EVER CARED ABOUTWAS MONEY. I WANTED TO HURT HIMTHE WAY HE'D HURT ME, BY STEALING THE DIAMONDS; WHEN HE CAUGHTME, I SHOT HIM IN SELF-DEFENSE!" YOU STEP INTO THE STRANGE LOOKING MACHINE, PEERING AT ALL THE CONTROLS, DIALS AND SWITCHES ON EACH WALL. SUDDENLY EVERYTHING BEGINS TO SHAKE, AND A REDLIGHT FLASHES THE WORDS, "PLEASEFASTEN YOUR SEAT BELT WHILE TRAVELLING THROUGH TIME."

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: YOUR MISSION INSTRUCTIONS ARE INTHE UPPER LEFT "H". FOR NOW, THOUGH, YOU'D BETTER PICK UP THEGUN AND USE "FIRE" TO SHOOT AT THAT ENEMY GUARD AT THE DOOR. ONLY ONE PERSON IN THE BUILDING WILL BE GLAD TO SEE YOU...AND ITISN'T HIM! YOUR MISSION, SHOULD YOU DECIDE TO ACCEPT IT, IS TO RESCUE THE KIDNAPPED DAUGHTER OF OUR LEADING ENERGY SCIENTIST AND RECOVERTHE MICROFILM SHOWING HIS PLANS FOR POLLUTION-FREE FUELS. BOTH ARE HIDDEN IN THIS BUILDING! TOREJECT MISSION, USE BOTTOM DOOR.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: CONGRATULATIONS! YOU'VE FOUND THE MICROFILM AND PREVENTED THE FORCES OF EVIL FROM USING THIS NEW TECHNOLOGY FOR DESTRUCTIVE PURPOSES! TO EARN A REWARD FOR YOUR HEROISM, DROP THE RED KEY ON THE WEIRD MACHINE IN THE UPPER RIGHT CORNER OF THIS ROOM. CONGRATULATIONS! YOU'VE RESCUEDTHE GIRL AND THWARTED THE WICKEDVILLAINS! BUT YOU STILL HAVE TORECOVER THE MICROFILM! THE FATEOF THE FREE WORLD STILL HANGS INTHE BALANCE!

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THIS IS A DETECTIVE ADVENTURE WHERE YOU GET TO SOLVE A MURDER AND CATCH THE CRIMINAL. BE SURETO RE-QUESTION THE SUSPECTS ANY TIME YOU FIND NEW EVIDENCE--THEYMAY HAVE SOMETHING NEW TO SAY! IF YOU WISH TO LEAVE THIS AREA, USE THE BOTTOM DOOR. THE SUBWAY STATIONS LET YOU MOVEFROM PLACE TO PLACE IN THE GAME.THE BOTTOM TRACK ALWAYS RUNS TO THE EAST (RIGHT), THE TOP TRACK RUNS TO THE WEST (LEFT); IF YOU TRY TO GO TOO FAR YOU'LL BE RETURNED TO THE SAME STATION. USE SIDE DOORS TO CROSS TRACKS.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: CONGRATULATIONS! YOU HAVE UNMASKED THE MURDERER AND ACQUIREDHER CONFESSION. DOUBTLESS YOU WILL NOW TURN HER OVER TO THE AUTHORITIES WITH A PLEA FOR LEN-IENCY DUE TO BLUBLUD'S CRUELTY. THE DOOR AT THE BOTTOM OF THE ROOM LEADS BACK TO THE MAP. THE CAR YOU USE IN THIS GAME TO VISIT DIFFERENT PLACES IS CLASSIFIED, FOR THE PURPOSES OF THE GAME, AS A "PORTAL". WHEN SET FOR "ONE-WAY TRAVEL WITH NO RETURN", A PAIR OF PORTALS CAN SEND THE PLAYER BACK AND FORTH BETWEEN ANY TWO GAME LOCATIONS.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE TABLE IN THIS ROOM IS A "CUSTOM SPACE", SET UP TO GIVE YOU ONE PREDETERMINED OBJECT WHENEVER ANOTHER PREDETERMINED OBJECT IS DROPPED ON IT. THIS IS ONLY ONE OF OVER THIRTY DIFFERENT THINGS THAT SPACES AND CUSTOM SPACES CAN BE MADE TO DO. THIS ROOM SHOWS HOW MUCH VARIETYYOU CAN ADD TO ANY ROOM BY PUTTING DIFFERENT OBSTACLES ON TOP OF THE STANDARD "WALL". JUST REMEMBER THAT ONLY OBSTACLES CANBE PLACED HERE: SPACES, ETC. ARENOT ALLOWED. YOU CAN ALSO USE AN OBSTACLE WITH A BLANK IMAGE.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THIS "ROOM" SHOWS HOW YOU CAN MAKE A SPACE FEEL LIKE IT'S OUTSIDE BY MAKING THE WALLS BLANK. THEN YOU CAN PUT ANY OBSTACLE YOU WANT ON TOP OF SOMEOF THE BLANK WALLS TO CREATE THEIMPRESSION OF NEIGHBORING BUILD-INGS, GARDENS, FOREST, ETC. THE DOORS AT THE SIDE OF THIS ROOM, WHICH ALLOW YOU TO GET AROUND THE TRACKS UNINJURED, AREREALLY "PORTALS" SET UP FOR ONE-WAY TRAVEL. THE TOP DOOR IS SETTO TAKE ANYONE WHO ENTERS TO THESPACE IN FRONT OF THE BOTTOM DOOR, AND VICE VERSA.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE FAST-TALKING BANK GUARD IN THIS ROOM IS REALLY A "SPACE" SET UP TO PERMIT PLAYERS TO GET BY ONLY IF THEY'RE CARRYING A PREDETERMINED OBJECT. THESE SPACES MAY TELL YOU WHY THEY BLOCK YOU, OR MAY BE HIDDEN INSIDE A NORMAL WALL, FOREST, ETC. THIS PART OF THE DUNGEON CONSISTS OF A LABYRINTH (A MAZE) OFROOMS WHICH ALL APPEAR IDENTICALAND DON'T SEEM TO CONNECT TO ANYTHING ELSE IN A COHERENT WAY.HINT: DROP A DIFFERENT ITEM IN EACH ROOM TO LEARN THEIR MAGICALPATTERNS; THE STAIRS ALLOW EXIT.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THIS ROOM SHOWS HOW YOU CAN USE AN OBJECT (IN THIS CASE A "CUSTOM OBSTACLE") TO IMPROVE SOMEONE'S CAPABILITIES. TRY TOUCHING THE ALTAR AND SEE WHAT HAPPENS! BUT WATCH OUT FOR THATEVIL CLERIC--HE DEFINITELY WON'TWANT YOU IN THERE! THIS MINI-ADVENTURE TAKES PLACE IN THREE DIFFERENT LOCATIONS: A SPACE SHIP, THE SURFACE OF A DISTANT PLANET AND THE DUSTY MINES OF A ROCKY ASTEROID. THE DOOR AT THE TOP WILL TAKE YOU TOTHE BRIDGE OF THE SPACE SHIP; THE DOOR BELOW LEADS TO THE MAP.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: "CAPTAIN," THE WOMAN SAYS, "IF YOU'D LIKE TO RETURN TO THE MAP OF AVENTURIA, JUST STEP THROUGH THIS DOOR. OF COURSE, THERE'LL BE FORMS TO FILL OUT, PAPERS TO SIGN, AFFIDAVITS TO NOTARIZE, APPROVALS TO ACQUIRE, PROCEDURESTO FOLLOW, REGISTRATIONS TO..." "WELL, CAPTAIN, IT'S GOOD TO SEEYOU!" THE MEDICAL OFFICER SAYS. "OUR LAST TIME BACK AT HOME PORTWE INSTALLED HERE IN SICK BAY THE NEWEST, MOST ADVANCED DEVICETO HEAL INJURIES KNOWN IN THE ENTIRE GALAXY. FEEL FREE TO USEIT ANY TIME!"

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE INNER WALLS OF THIS ROOM AREALL MADE OF DOORS. TRY GOING THROUGH THE INTERIOR DOORS, THENTRY GOING THROUGH THOSE THAT MAKE UP THE OUTER WALL. THERE IS ANOTHER WAY OUT OF THE ROOM! YOU CAN GO BACK UP THE STAIRS TOTHE LABYRINTH ANY TIME YOU WISH. HIDDEN SOMEWHERE IN THIS ROOM ISA MAGIC SCROLL YOU'LL NEED TO GET ALL THE WAY THROUGH THIS MINI-ADVENTURE. HINT: YOU MAY HAVE TO DROP SOME OF YOUR TREASURE IN ORDER TO FIND THE SCROLLAND TAKE IT WITH YOU!

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: WELCOME TO THE DEEP DANK DUNGEONAND A QUEST TO SOLVE A GREAT MYSTERY! WISTRIK THE EVIL, A POWERFUL WIZARD, HAS BUILT THIS MAGICAL ROOM COMPLEX AND CREATEDSOMETHING UNIQUELY POWERFUL DEEPBENEATH IT. CAN YOU FIND IT? THE BOTTOM DOOR IS AN EXIT. IN THE LAST ROOM THE WALLS ALL LOOKED LIKE DOORS. WELL, IN THIS ROOM THERE'S A HIDDEN DOOR THAT LOOKS LIKE A WALL! THE DOOR LEADING UPWARDS OUT OF THE DUNGEON IS VISIBLE; THE OTHER DOOR IS HARDER--TRY BUMPING INTOEVERY WALL SQUARE TO FIND IT.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: WELCOME! MOVING ONTO A "HELP SQUARE" ("H") GIVES A MESSAGE. FOR "HOW TO PLAY", USE THE DOOR JUST ABOVE YOU. TO SKIP TO "AGENT OO111" USE THE DOOR TO THE RIGHT. TO GO BACK TO THE MAP, USE THE DOOR BELOW YOU. TO PICK UP THE SWORD IN THIS ROOM, TRY TO MOVE ONTO IT AND READ THE MESSAGES THAT WILL APPEAR. THE SWORD MIGHT COME INHANDY IF YOU SHOULD MEET ANY VICIOUS ENEMIES LATER ON.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: TO FIGHT THE DRAGON, TRY TO MOVEON TOP OF HIM, THEN PRESS THE BUTTON AS INSTRUCTED. IF YOU KILL HIM, BE SURE TO PICK UP THELAMP HE'S CARRYING. IT MIGHT BEMAGIC. READ THE OTHER HELP SQUARE BEFORE YOU ENTER BATTLE TO LEARN ABOUT THE HOSPITAL. BEFORE GOING INTO BATTLE WITH THE DRAGON, PUSH AGAINST THE RED"+" (THE HOSPITAL) TO INCREASE YOUR LIFE FORCE. USING TURNS TOSELECT "REST" CAN HEAL WOUNDS, TOO. YOU CAN REST UNTIL YOUR LIFE FORCE IS BACK TO ITS MAX'M.HOSPITALS ADD TO THAT MAXIMUM.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: YOUR CHARACTER'S SKILLS IMPROVE WITH BATTLE EXPERIENCE. BATTLESCAN AFFECT YOUR POWER, TOO. ANDCASTING SPELLS USES POWER. FOR A POWER BOOST AND A LESSON IN SPELL CASTING, PASS INTO THE NEXT ROOM. TO CAST THE SPELL WHICH THE LAMPGAVE YOU, PRESS THE BUTTON AND SELECT "USE POWER", THEN SELECT "SUMMON GENIE" (AND WATCH YOUR POWER BAR). IF THE SPELL FIZZLES, TRY IT AGAIN. DO NOT LEAVE OR TOUCH THINGS UNTIL THE GENIE COMES AND GIVES YOU A GIFT

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: POWER DECAYS UNTIL IT EQUALS YOUR WISDOM. LIFE FORCE CANNOT BE HEALED PAST THE LIMIT OF YOURCONSTITUTION (EXCEPT BY MAGIC SPELLS). TO LEARN MORE, SEE "A SUMMARY OF SKILLS AND TRAITS" INTHE MANUAL. THE DOOR AHEAD LEADS TO "AGENT OO111". THE BOTTOM DOOR LEADS BACK TO THE MAP; THE DOOR AT THE LEFT GOES BACK TO THE FIRST ROOMS OF "HOW TO PLAY". THROUGH THE TOP DOOR IS THE HEADQUARTERS OF THE SECRET POLICE OF AN EVIL NATION.USE THE HOSPITAL REPEATEDLY TO BUILD UP YOUR LIFE FORCE NOW.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE MOMENT YOU ENTER THE SECRET POLICE HEADQUARTERS ABOVE, BE READY TO FIND A WEAPON AND FIGHTAN ENEMY. NEVER HESITATE TO RUNOUT OF A ROOM TO REST AND HEAL IF WOUNDED. HINT: TO RESCUE PERSONS WHO SEEM TOO WEAK TO WALK, PICK THEM UP. ALL THAT GLITTERS IS NOT GOLD...THIS INTERESTING-LOOKING CHEST WAS ACTUALLY A BOOBY TRAP THAT TOOK AWAY YOUR "SUMMON GENIE" SPELL. YOU'LL NOTICE, TOO, THATTHE MAGIC LAMP DISAPPEARED AFTERYOU RUBBED IT. (WE HOPE YOU AL-READY GOT THE GENIE'S GIFT!)

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: ON CHRISTMAS EVE OF 1776, GEORGEWASHINGTON LED A SMALL GROUP OF SOLDIERS ACROSS THE DELAWARE RIVER TO ATTACK HESSIAN SOLDIERSOCCUPYING THE TOWN OF TRENTON. IN THIS ADVENTURE YOU'LL LEARN MORE ABOUT THAT FATEFUL NIGHT...BUT WE FORGOT ONE HISTORIC ITEM! THE BOOKSHOP OWNER TELLS YOU, "YOU KNOW, I THINK YOU'RE A GREAT PERSON WHO MIGHT BE VERY FAMOUS ONE DAY. IF YOU'LL GO OVER TO MY TABLE AND DROP OFF YOUR AUTOGRAPH, I'LL CONTRIBUTE TO THE CAUSE TO HELP YOU BUY SUPPLIES FOR YOUR ARMY."

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE FARMER LOOKS AT YOU, SHAKES HIS HEAD AND SAYS "TOO BAD YOU CAN'T CROSS THE RIVER IN THIS BLIZZARD. MY COUSIN THE STOREKEEPER TELLS ME THE HESSIAN SOL-DIERS HAVE BOUGHT EVERY BOTTLE OF BRANDY IN TRENTON. THEY MUSTBE AWFULLY DRUNK BY NOW..." WHAT DID WE FORGET TO ADD? JUSTA BOAT TO GET YOU ACROSS THE DELAWARE, THAT'S ALL. YOU'LL HAVE TO IMPROVE ON HISTORY IN ORDER TO DEFEAT THE HESSIANS. THE BOTTOM DOOR LEADS BACK TO THE MAP; THE OTHER THREE DOORS LEAD TO PARTS OF THE ADVENTURE.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE WOMAN INTRODUCES HERSELF AS A TRENTON SCHOOLTEACHER. SHE ASKS YOU, "IF 7 X 8 EQUALS 63, GO OUT THE TOP DOOR. IF 7 X 8 EQUALS 56, GO OUT THE DOOR AT THE LEFT. I COULD QUIZ YOU ON ALMOST ANYTHING THIS WAY! AND PLEASE JOIN THE TRENTON PTA!" "HI! I'M THE TWIN SISTER OF THETRENTON SCHOOLTEACHER! I'M AFRAID THAT 7 X 8 DOESN'T EQUAL 63. BUT WHILE YOU'RE HERE, OUR DRAMA CLUB IS HAVING A BAKE SALEAND I'M SURE YOU'LL WANT TO BUY A CAKE OR TWO FOR YOUR TROOPS, AND OUR CHRISTMAS PLAY IS..."

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: "HI! I'M THE TWIN SISTER OF THE TRENTON SCHOOLTEACHER, AND I'M DELIGHTED TO TELL YOU THAT 7 X 8DOES INDEED EQUAL 56! YOU'RE GREAT! WHEN COMPUTERS ARE INVENTED IN 175 YEARS, YOU COULD PROBABLY PROGRAM THEM! I'VE GOTAN IDEA CALLED 'ADVENTURE'..." "YOU AND YOUR MEN ARE WELCOME HERE IN OUR HOUSE. ALL THOSE HESSIANS HAVE BEEN DOING IS DRINKING AND CARRYING ON AS IF TRENTON WERE SODOM AND GOMORRAH!THEY DON'T EVEN SPEAK ENGLISH-- ONLY GERMAN!"

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: "I'M HAPPY TO SEE YOU AND YOUR TROOPS HERE. THESE HESSIANS AREJUST MERCENARIES--SOLDIERS WHO FIGHT FOR THE MONEY, NOT FOR HIGH IDEALS LIKE LIBERTY AND JUSTICE. NOW THAT YOU'RE BACK IN NEW JERSEY THINGS WILL BE BETTER!" BE CAREFUL GOING INTO THE NEXT ROOM. UP UNTIL NOW ALL THE PEOPLE YOU'VE MET HAVE REALLY BEEN "OBSTACLES" MADE TO LOOK LIKE PEOPLE WHO TALK TO YOU. THE GUY IN THE NEXT ROOM FEELS MORE LIKE SHOOTING THAN TALKING!

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: YOU'VE CAPTURED THE SLEEPING COMMANDER OF THE HESSIANS AND RECAPTURED THE CITY OF TRENTON! NOW YOU CAN MARCH ON CORNWALLIS AT PRINCETON--AND YOU'LL WIN! YOU'VE REVIVED A REVOLUTION THATWAS ALMOST LOST! THE DOOR ABOVELEADS BACK TO THE MAP... THE COMMUNICATIONS OFFICER TELLSYOU, "SIR, I'M PICKING UP AN URGENT DISTRESS CALL FROM PLANETIRATA! KING BAN-DUNTEN SAYS THEMINING OF CRYSTITE HAS COME TO A TOTAL HALT, AND THAT ALL THE REFINED CRYSTITE ON THE PLANET HAS BEEN STOLEN!"

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE SCIENCE OFFICER SAYS, "A MOST UNUSUAL AND INTERESTING PUZZLE, CAPTAIN. IT WOULD APPEAR THAT SOMEONE HAS PLANTED A BOMB IN THE PORT ENGINE POD. LOGIC WOULD SUGGEST TO US, SIR, THAT THERE IS A TRAITOR IN OUR MIDST. FASCINATING." IN RESPONSE TO YOUR QUESTIONING,THE NAVIGATOR SAYS, "WE HAVE YUST ARRIVED IN PLANETARY ORBIT AROUND IRATA, CYAPTAIN. THE F.S. CONQUISTADOR MAY BEAM YOU DOWN TO THE CYAPITAL AT ANY TIME." (HINT: USE DIALECTS LIKETHIS TO ADD COLOR TO YOUR TEXT.)

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: TURNING TO FACE YOU, THE YOUNG ENSIGN, ON HIS FIRST VOYAGE WITHTHE F.S. CONQUISTADOR, SAYS "WE SHOULD BE ABLE TO COMPLETE THE NEEDED REPAIRS ON OUR SHIP'SWEAPONS SYSTEMS HERE, CAPTAIN. WE'LL ONLY BE DEFENSELESS FOR THE NEXT THREE DAYS." "HELLO, CAPTAIN," THE CREWMAN SAYS, SMILING. "I'M READY TO BEAM YOU DOWN TO THE SURFACE. JUST STEP INTO THE TRANSPORTER AND YOU'LL BE ON YOUR WAY."

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: CONGRATULATIONS, CAPTAIN! YOU HAVE SUCCESSFULLY DISARMED THE BOMB! BUT BEFORE YOU TURN YOURATTENTION TO PLANETSIDE AND THE MATTER OF THE MISSING CRYSTITE, YOU'D BETTER FIND THE TRAITOR ONBOARD THE F.S. CONQUISTADOR. TRY GOING BACK TO THE BRIDGE. "AYE, CUPTIN," SAYS THE SCOTTISHENGINEERING OFFICER, "IT DUSN'T LOOK GOOD. THE BUMB IS IN THE HEART OF THE PORT ENGINE POD. IF SHE BLOWS, SHE'LL TAKE US ALLWITH HER! WE'VE GUT TO FIND SOMETHING TO PUT OVER THE BUMB TO NEUTRALIZE THE CORBOMITE..."

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE ENSIGN LOOKS AT YOU WITH ADMIRATION. "THAT WAS A WONDER-FUL ACT OF COURAGE AND BRAVERY, CAPTAIN! NOW YOU CAN TAKE THAT BOMB FRAGMENT TO THE BRIDGE AND USE THE AMINO ACIDS TRACE ANALYZER TO IDENTIFY THE TRAITOR WHOPLANTED THE BOMB!" IF YOU FIND YOURSELF NEEDING MONEY HERE IN TOWN, DON'T FORGETTHAT YOU HAVE A LITTLE NEST EGG STASHED AWAY FOR A RAINY DAY BACK IN YOUR QUARTERS.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: "I AM MUCH RELIEVED THAT YOU HAVE ESCAPED THE VULTURE BOULDERAND NOW CAN STOP WISTRIK IN HIS WICKED PLOT! THE LAST WHO TRIEDTO ESCAPE THIS PLACE I GAVE THE ACCESS CODE FOR KRAZO. DID YOU FIND IT? YOU MUST STOP WISTRIK AND HIS DOUBLE PLANS FOR EVIL!" KING BAN-DUNTEN WELCOMES YOU, SAYING "CAPTAIN, FINALLY YOU'RE HERE! LOOTERS ARE IN THE CITY! STRANGE BEASTS HAVE APPEARED IN OUR COUNTRYSIDE! AND THE CRYSTITE...A CURSE HAS BEEN PLACED ON MY POOR PEOPLE! YOU MUST FIND A WAY TO HELP US!"

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: "CAPTAIN," THE CREWMAN SAYS, "JUST DROP ANYTHING INTO THE AMINO ACIDS TRACE ANALYZER HERE AND WE CAN TELL RIGHT OFF THE NAME OF ANYONE IN THE CREW WHO EVER TOUCHED IT. IF IT ISN'T A CLUE TO THE MYSTERY, IT'LL JUST SIT THERE." "YES, I CONFESS! I DID IT!" THE ENSIGN HANGS HIS HEAD, FULL OF SHAME. "WISTRIK SAID HE'D CREATE A DOUBLE OF ME, AN EXACT DUPLICATE INTO WHOM MY SOUL COULD BE TRANSFERRED BEFORE MY DEATH, GIVING ME ETERNAL LIFE!" SECURITY LEADS HIM TO THE BRIG.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE CREWMAN SAYS, "THE OUTPUT OFTHE AMINO ACIDS TRACE ANALYZER SAYS THAT OUR NEW ENSIGN WAS THEONE WHO PLANTED THE BOMB. PERHAPS YOU'D BETTER GO HAVE A TALKWITH HIM, SIR. HERE HE COMES." THE CHAMBER WITHIN THIS ROOM WHICH HAS NO DOORS IS NOT AS AIR-TIGHT AS IT MIGHT LOOK. TRYFIRING A MISSILE WEAPON HERE-- YOU MIGHT GET A SURPRISE! BUT THAT MACHINE IN THERE SURE LOOKSDANGEROUS...NOT TO MENTION THE DUDE IN THE RED CLOAK!

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: YOU ARE NOW IN THE HEART OF THE CRYSTITE MINES OF THE ASTEROID KRAZO, IN ORBIT AROUND THE PLANET IRATA. YOUR SHIP, THE F.S. CONQUISTADOR, IS ALSO IN ORBIT AROUND THE PLANET. THE DEVICE BEFORE YOU IS THE TIME MACHINE OF WISTRIK THE EVIL. YOU ARE AT THE HEART OF THE DEEPDANK DUNGEON. BEFORE YOU IS THETIME MACHINE OF WISTRIK THE EVIL. ENTER AT YOUR OWN RISK! THE BEING IN THE RED ROBE IS WISTRIK THE EVIL, BUT THERE ARE STORIES IN THE LAND THAT HE HAS MAGICALLY DUPLICATED HIMSELF.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: WELCOME TO THE ACS VERSION OF ALICE IN WONDERLAND. THIS MINI-ADVENTURE CONTAINS FEW PUZZLES, BUT INSTEAD LETS YOU "BE" ALICE AND MEET SOME OF THE CRAZY CHAR-ACTERS FROM THE BOOK. THERE IS NO FIGHTING HERE, EITHER! THE BOTTOM DOOR LEADS TO THE MAP. ALICE WAS BEGINNING TO GET VERY TIRED OF SITTING BY HER SISTER ON THE BANK, AND OF HAVING NOTH-ING TO DO. ONCE OR TWICE SHE HAD PEEPED INTO THE BOOK HER SISTER WAS READING, BUT IT HAD NO PICTURES OR CONVERSATIONS IN IT. PERHAPS SHE'D PICK DAISIES.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: HOW DID WE FORCE THE WHITE RABBIT TO LEAVE THE ROOM? A CREATURE WON'T STEP ON A "SPACE"(THE KIND YOU PLACE IN THE ROOM)OF ANY KIND. SINCE THE WHITE RABBIT WAS SURROUNDED BY THREE SPACES, HE HAD NO CHOICE BUT TO GO DOWN THE RABBIT HOLE. "I WISH I HADN'T CRIED SO MUCH WHEN I GREW SO LARGE," SAID ALICE, AS SHE SWAM ABOUT, TRYINGTO FIND HER WAY OUT. A MOUSE AND A BIRD HAD SLIPPED AND FALLEN IN LIKE HERSELF. ALICE LED THE WAY AND THE WHOLE PARTY SWAM TO SHORE.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: ALICE HEARD THE WHITE RABBIT MOANING THAT HE HAD LOST HIS FANAND GLOVES. "I'D BETTER TAKE HIM HIS FAN AND GLOVES--THAT IS,IF I CAN FIND THEM. HOW QUEER IT SEEMS TO BE GOING MESSAGES FOR A RABBIT!" (THAT MEANS RUN-NING ERRANDS, BY THE WAY!) ALICE STRETCHED HERSELF UP ON TIPTOE, AND PEEKED OVER THE TIP OF THE MUSHROOM, AND HER EYES IMMEDIATELY MET THOSE OF A LARGEBLUE CATERPILLAR, ARMS FOLDED, QUIETLY SMOKING A LONG HOOKAH, AND TAKING NOT THE SMALLEST NOTICE OF HER OR ANYTHING ELSE.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THE KITCHEN WAS FULL OF SMOKE FROM ONE END TO THE OTHER. THE COOK SET TO THROWING EVERYTHING IN HER REACH AT THE DUCHESS. THE DUCHESS TOOK NO NOTICE OF THEM EVEN WHEN THEY HIT HER. "OH, PLEASE STOP WHAT YOU'RE DOING!" CRIED ALICE! THE CHESHIRE CAT ONLY GRINNED WHEN IT SAW ALICE. "WHICH WAY OUGHT I TO GO FROM HERE?" SHE ASKED. "THAT DEPENDS ON WHERE YOU WANT TO GET TO," SAID THE CAT. THE CAT VANISHED QUITE SLOWLY, ENDING WITH ITS GRIN, WHICH REMAINED FOR SOME TIME.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THERE WAS A TABLE SET OUT UNDER A TREE IN FRONT OF THE HOUSE, AND THE MARCH HARE AND THE MAD HATTER WERE HAVING TEA AT IT. ADORMOUSE WAS SITTING BETWEEN THEM, FAST ASLEEP, AND THE OTHERTWO WERE RESTING THEIR ELBOWS ONIT AND TALKING OVER ITS HEAD. THE CROQUET GROUND WAS FULL OF CHARACTERS PLAYING, USING HEDGE-HOGS FOR BALLS AND FLAMINGOS FORMALLETS, NEITHER OF WHOM WERE WONT TO COOPERATE. THE QUEEN WAS IN A FURIOUS PASSION, STAMP-ING ABOUT AND SHOUTING "OFF WITHHIS HEAD!" ABOUT ONCE A MINUTE.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: "LET THE JURY CONSIDER THEIR VERDICT!" SAID THE KING. "NO, NO!" SAID THE QUEEN, "SENTENCE FIRST, VERDICT AFTERWORDS!" "NONSENSE!" SAID ALICE LOUDLY. "YOU'RE NOTHING BUT A PACK OF CARDS!" AT THIS THE WHOLE PACK CAME FLYING DOWN UPON HER... THE WHITE RABBIT BLEW THREE BLASTS ON THE TRUMPET, THEN UNROLLED THE PARCHEMENT AND READ"THE QUEEN OF HEARTS, SHE MADE SOME TARTS, ALL ON A SUMMER DAY;THE KNAVE OF HEARTS, HE STOLE THOSE TARTS, AND TOOK THEM QUITEAWAY!" THE TRIAL BEGAN.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: ALICE GAVE A LITTLE SCREAM AND TRIED TO BEAT THEM OFF... "WAKE UP, ALICE DEAR!" SAID HER SISTER. "OH, I'VE HAD SUCH A CURIOUS DREAM!" SAID ALICE. SHEGOT UP AND RAN OFF, THINKING WHAT A WONDERFUL DREAM IT HAD BEEN. CONGRATULATIONS! YOU'VE JUST COMPLETED THIS ADVENTURE AND SAVED THE ALLIED WAR EFFORT! THIS REGION IS A GOOD STARTING POINT IF YOU EVER WANT TO BUILD YOUR OWN WORLD WAR II SCENARIO. THE DOOR AT THE TOP OF THE ROOM LEADS BACK TO THE MAP.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: YOU HAVE FOUND THE MISSING CRYS-TITE AND SAVED IRATA--THE KING IS SO GRATEFUL TO YOU FOR SAVINGTHE MINES THAT HE GIVES YOU THE BAG!! HINT: IF THE CRYSTITE IS TOO HEAVY TO CARRY, A MAGIC BAG WILL HELP YOU CARRY IT TO A STORE WHERE YOU CAN SELL IT! CONGRATULATIONS! YOU'VE JUST FOUND A MASSIVE BAG OF CRYSTITE,WHICH IS FIVE TIMES MORE VALUABLE THAN GOLD! BUT CRYSTITE IS ONLY FOUND IN THE IRATAN PLANETARY SYSTEM...HOW DID IT GET HERE? MORE IMPORTANTLY, AREYOU STRONG ENOUGH TO CARRY IT?

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: YOU MAY OWN ONLY ONE PISTOL IN AVENTURIA. IF YOU NEED TO MOVE THE ONE THE GUARD HAD, (HE ISN'TSTILL SHOOTING AT YOU, IS HE, OLD CHAP?) DROP THE ONE YOU NOW HAVE OVER HERE IN THE CORNER. YOU CAN THEN PICK UP THE OTHER ONE AND PROCEED ON YOUR MISSION. DIRECTLY IN FRONT OF YOU IS THE NOT-SO-FAMOUS (BECAUSE WE MADE IT UP) GENERAL STORE IN MORRISVILLE, PENNSYLVANIA. TO SELL YOUR DIAMONDS, JUST FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS YOU'RE GIVEN WHEN YOU FIRST ENTER THE STORE. YOU CAN THEN BUY SOMETHING ELSE.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: AS YOU PLAY THE MINI-ADVENTURES IN THE LAND OF AVENTURIA, REMEM-BER THAT THEY ARE DESIGNED TO LET YOU SEE A WIDE VARIETY OF LOCALES, CHARACTERS, PROPS AND SITUATIONS--ALL WITHOUT GETTING KILLED, THANKS TO THE HOSPITALS.(CONTINUED IN NEXT HELP SQUARE) EACH MINI-ADVENTURE CONTAINS ALLTHE CLUES AND PROPS YOU'LL NEED TO SOLVE ITS PUZZLES. "RIVERS OF LIGHT" AND OTHER ADVENTURES WILL SCATTER ITEMS AND CLUES OVER A WIDER AREA, AND HAVE NO HOSPITALS TO RESTORE LIFE FORCE.(CONTINUED IN NEXT HELP SQUARE)

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: THESE SCENARIOS WILL GIVE YOU PRACTICE IN ALL THE SKILLS YOU WILL NEED TO PLAY CHALLENGING ADVENTURES SUCCESSFULLY. AND THEY'LL GIVE YOU LOTS OF IDEAS FOR GREAT ADVENTURES OF YOUR OWNTHAT YOU CAN DESIGN USING YOUR ADVENTURE CONSTRUCTION SET! BE SURE TO GET THE PISTOL FROM THE DESK BEFORE YOU LEAVE THE ROOM. (DROP THE ONE YOU'RE CAR-RYING, IF NECESSARY, SO YOU CAN PICK IT UP.) THE DESK IS A "CUSTOM SPACE" THAT PLAYS A KEY PART IN THE ADVENTURE--BUT ONLY IF IT'S UNCOVERED!

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: WELCOME TO THE SECRET ADVENTURE!WE HID THIS REGION AND LEFT IT OFF THE MAP IN THE MANUAL TO IL-LUSTRATE AN IMPORTANT POINT: SOMETIMES THE BEST MAPS IN ADVENTURE GAMES ARE THE ONES THAT ONLY TELL YOU PART OF THE STORY!(SOMETIMES THEY MAY EVEN LIE!) THIS ADVENTURE WILL GIVE YOU LOTS OF CHANCES TO PRACTICE YOURSKILLS IN DEALING WITH BOTH HOS-TILE AND FRIENDLY CREATURES THATYOU'LL FIND IN THE 3 "BASE SETS"AVAILABLE FOR YOUR USE. LOOK FOR MONSTERS YOU'LL WANT TO USE IN THE GAMES YOU WANT TO DESIGN.

nodes.speaker: Land of Aventuria
nodes.text: SINCE YOU CAN MAKE EVERY MONSTERAND PERSON A LITTLE BIT DIFFERENT FROM EVERYONE ELSE WITH THE SAME NAME AND PICTURE, DON'T AS-SUME THAT EVERY DWARF YOU SEE CARRYING AN AXE WILL BEHAVE AND PERFORM IN THE SAME WAY. ONE MAY BE STRENGTH 10, ANOTHER 100

extractionWarnings: This is an import/reconstruction scaffold, not a fully validated playable package.
Map dimensions, room coordinates, entity placements, exits, and exact triggers are placeholders until binary map/object records are decoded.
Some item/entity mappings are inferred from decoded prose, not exact object table records.
